title: rhynchosia congensis subsp. pseudobuettneri
intro: Rhynchosia congensis subsp. pseudobuettneri, also known as Wild Lettuce or Bushy Pea Shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, and is also valued for its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhynchosia congensis subsp. pseudobuettneri include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use as a wound treatment to promote healing and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, Rhynchosia congensis subsp. pseudobuettneri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
